description:
Purpose: finalize the core turn model.

Done when:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Completed E2. Core chat/session model is now covered across module, pid, id, and session targets; sessions are documented and tested as descriptors/addressing; duplicate facades are removed; edge cases and beginner-facing error shapes are covered; process ownership docs are clearer.

title: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions
